productDisplayName: Puma Women White Trinity Casual Shoes
description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simplistic designs. This pair of Trinity shoes from puma is a comfortable and stylish footwear choice. A pair of sneaker style shoes that does not conform, these shoes reflect the contemporary urge for individualism. Pair it with fitted denims and a T-shirt. UpperFabric upper with check patterned overlays for dry comfortFormstripe for shoe structureLacing system covering only the forefoot and an outer tongueSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with waffle patterned grooves for grip and tractionShoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
